final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 16:9 news/editorial banner image for Weibo hot-topic feature.

Style/medium: needs a documentary/photojournalism aesthetic with mobile-phone-captured realism — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide panoramic 16:9 horizontal format with ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk with pedestrians in motion, neon signs beginning to glow, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset
Scene/backdrop: must include urban cityscape at twilight, dramatic light contrast between fading sunset and emerging neon
Lighting/mood: needs a twilight atmosphere with dramatic light contrast — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusk-to-night transition direction — exact color ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs realistic surface treatment — exact grain and sharpness levels are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" as prominent headline; must include "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" as subtitle; must include "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" as watermark in bottom-right or bottom area
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, must maintain ample horizontal negative space for text placement, must convey authentic on-site documentary feel
Avoid:
